# `/playanimation` Command
Makes one or more entities play a one-off animation. Assumes all variables are setup correctly.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/playanimation <entity: target> <animation: string> [next_state: string] [blend_out_time: float] [stop_expression: string] [controller: string]`

## Arguments
- `animation`: string
- `blend_out_time`: float
- `controller`: string
- `entity`: target
- `next_state`: string
- `stop_expression`: string
